ns_relevant_entities: Hari Keputeraan Ke-77 Yang Dipertuan Besar Negeri Sembilan (event, past, royalty)
key_finding: ZERO entities related to Negeri Sembilan PRN 2026 (state election) were found in the 20260711 collection. The collection is dominated by PRN JOHOR (Johor state election polling day, 11 Julai 2026), World Cup 2026, Sukan Komanwel, tech news, and 404 error pages. The only Negeri Sembilan-tagged source (ohbulan) contains old (2021-2025) entertainment/lifestyle/royalty articles with no election content. None of NS's 36 DUN constituencies, no NS state politicians, and no NS election issues appear in any source.

source_quality.dominant_topic: PRN Johor (Johor state election polling day, 11 Julai 2026)

sentiment_analysis_readiness.reason: No Negeri Sembilan election-relevant entities found to analyze. Sentiment analysis on the current collection would measure Johor election sentiment and World Cup coverage, not NS PRN 2026.
sentiment_analysis_readiness.recommendation: Collection script (ns-daily-collection.sh) is querying source URLs that return 404 pages and/or Johor-focused landing pages rather than Negeri Sembilan-specific election content. Collection targeting must be fixed before useful NS entity extraction or sentiment analysis is possible.
